is_p_falciparum.evidence: Entire review focuses on P. falciparum antifolate resistance and PfDHFR structure.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Discusses Pfdhfr mutations at codons 51, 59, 108 (e.g. 'Ser108Asn', 'Asn51Ile', 'Cys59Arg'), which are curated Pfdhfr positions.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: This is a review/modelling paper. It discusses mutations qualitatively ('the primary mutation to appear in the field is Ser108Asn') but reports no numerator/denominator counts or per-locus frequencies from field samples.

sub_country_location.evidence: No field survey with sub-national locations; only references to strains (Thailand K1, Tanzanian F32, 'Camp', 'Uganda') from cited literature, no frequency data tied to locations.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: No original field collection with dated sampling; it is a homology-modelling review.

african_field_samples.evidence: No original African field/clinical isolate data collected; the study is computational modelling of enzyme structure using lab strains and published sequences.

is_primary_study.evidence: Title and abstract state 'This review focuses on the activity of drugs on DHFR'; it is a review combined with homology-modelling, not a primary empirical field study.

duplicate_risk.evidence: No field dataset presented; no cohort or surveillance overlap relevant.

supplement.evidence: No frequency data exists in this modelling review; supplementary materials would not contain extractable field frequencies.

assessment.summary: This is a review and homology-modelling paper on antifolate resistance mechanisms in P. falciparum DHFR. It discusses resistance-associated Pfdhfr codons (51, 59, 108) structurally but reports no field-derived per-locus frequency data, no sub-country locations, and no dated African field samples. It fails multiple criteria and is not a primary empirical frequency study.
exclusion_reasons: Not a primary empirical study — it is a review/modelling paper
No sub-country location data for any frequency
No original African field/clinical isolate data
